meaning: adj.没有受过教育的,无知的
examples: Actually, this problem should be everyone's concern since uneducated, unemployed citizens affect us all.
She thought he was very common and uneducated.
Though an uneducated man, Charlie was not a stupid one.
Musa doesn't believe treatment of albinos will improve if Tanzanians remain uneducated about albinism.
Uneducated farmhands flocked to cities, arriving just in time for the Great Depression of the 1930s.
